name: Classy Agency
tagline: Cream agency proposal rebuilt into a 20-slide elegant source-inspired sequence with high-fashion serif typography, muted taupe geometry, portfolio grids, service pages, process, team, pricing, calendar, and closing layouts.

palette.description: Cream paper with taupe rectangles, olive grey blocks, charcoal labels, and restrained fashion-editorial serif type.

typography.style: Elegant fashion-editorial serif headings with rounded readable agency body copy, closer to a classy agency source than the prior generic serif pairing.

best_for: Agency proposals, brand strategy decks, premium service pitches, creative credentials, and consulting presentations that need tasteful structure.
avoid_for: Neon launches, dense analytics dashboards, technical architecture, or medical/scientific explainers.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Elegant and Classy Style Agency
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview structure: cream/taupe/olive geometry, large elegant serif headings, agency proposal sequence, service pages, portfolio panels, process timeline, team, pricing, calendar, and contact layouts. It does not reuse source presentation assets.
